base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario_climb — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. arms/legs alternate grab-positions on flagpole or vine. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame climbing cycle — arms/legs alternate grab-positions on flagpole or vine
